name: MELVIN
personality: MELVIN, brother of the Joker. Wanna-be super villain. Megalomaniacal, comedically fails a lot. Has an over-bearing Mother and lives under his brother, the famous villain the Joker's shadow.

special.name: LAUGH
special.description: Does his best 'Joker Laugh', embarassing the enemy and making them CRINGE. The CRINGE status effect causes the enemy to occasionally attack itself, lasting for 3-5 turns.
